data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: All available data points (xG, PPG, 1x2 odds) are consistent and indicate strong favoritism for Al Hilal. Missing data for goal markets' odds, standings, H2H, and sidelined players. No conflicting data sources.

CONCLUSION: Away Win.
